t.div: 📅 No appointments found for this date.

span.t-att-style: 'display:inline-block; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:50px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; ' + (appt.state === 'confirmed' ? 'background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);color:#fff;' : appt.state === 'in_progress' ? 'background:#fbbf24;color:#7c3500;' : appt.state === 'completed' ? 'background:#6ee7b7;color:#065f46;' : appt.state === 'cancelled' ? 'background:#fca5a5;color:#7f1d1d;' : appt.state === 'no_show' ? 'background:#fca5a5;color:#7f1d1d;' : 'background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;')

span.style: font-size:14px; font-weight:600; color:#2d2d4e; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis;
